body:
Parent issue: #126

Stage: simplify-project-planning-model

## Task

Define the minimal Sepo GitHub Project planning model for the setup/project-management workstream. Capture the agreed model clearly in repo docs and any existing config/spec surfaces that are appropriate without implementing full Project creation or sync yet. The model should use Project fields as the planning source of truth: Status values exactly `Inbox`, `In Progress`, `To Review`, `Done`; Priority values `P0`, `P1`, `P2`, `P3`; Effort values `Low`, `Medium`, `High`; optional Release field. Explicitly document that repo labels should stay minimal and operational by default: `agent`, one-shot `agent/*` trigger labels, and `agent-running/*` activity labels from PR #134. `priority/*` and `effort/*` labels should be treated as legacy/fallback opt-in for existing label-first project management, not the default for Project-backed planning. Preserve the assignment behavior from PR #136 and activity-label behavior from PR #134. Add focused docs/tests only where the repository already has testable constants or workflow expectations; avoid broad project creation, variable mutation, or sync behavior, which belong to later child tasks.

## Base

- base_pr: #136

<!-- sepo-sub-orchestrator parent:126 stage:simplify-project-planning-model state:done parent_round:2 -->
